name: Spike Trap
description: Steps on it. Takes damage. Classic.

name: Pitfall
description: A concealed pit. Falls in, hits the bottom hard. Big damage on entry.
flavorText: Down they go. The dungeon does not care for elegant solutions.

name: Arrow Trap
description: Fires when someone crosses a hidden tripwire. The arrow comes from a hole in the wall.
flavorText: The last thing many an adventurer sees is a small hole in the wall.

name: Greed Trap
description: Only triggers when an adventurer picks up loot. Perfect against Greedy types.
flavorText: The real treasure was the hubris all along.

name: Patience Trap
description: Triggers only if someone stands still for 3+ seconds. Directly counters Paranoid types who hesitate.
flavorText: The dungeon rewards the bold. Or at least punishes the timid.

name: Speed Trap
description: Triggers if someone moves above a speed threshold. Directly counters Speed Runners.

name: Mercy Trap
description: Triggers when an adventurer heals an ally. Punishes parties with Clerics or healing items.
flavorText: Compassion is a vulnerability. The dungeon exploits all vulnerabilities.

name: Echo Mine
description: Triggers on the second footstep, not the first. The leader steps over it safely. The follower does not.
flavorText: Front man's fine. Second man learns a lesson.

name: Memory Trap
description: Only affects adventurers who have been in this room before. Punishes returning parties.
flavorText: You've been here before. The dungeon remembers too.

name: Curse Brand Trap
description: Brands a random adventurer with a glowing mark. All minions now prioritize that target. No direct damage — just redirects all aggro.
flavorText: It doesn't hurt yet. It will.

name: Whisper Trap
description: The walls have ears. The walls also have teeth. Triggers whenever an adventurer speaks aloud in this room.

name: Torch Trap
description: A burst of flame from a hidden brazier. Only arms when the dungeon is shrouded in Eternal Night — adventurers can't see it coming when their vision is already limited.
flavorText: The dark gives them confidence. The dark is part of the trap.
